sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92865" key="r(ussai/nomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥυσσαίνομαι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥυσσός</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥυσσόομαι</orth>, etc., <sense id="n92865.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥυσός</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
